calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Vacated

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kristin Charbonnier, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendants.
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT TERESA ANASTASIO, VINCE ANASTASIO Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests is granted. Request For Monetary Sanctions is denied. Order signed. (Counsel left before having order processed). Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
